character.name: Eir Niflheimr
character.bio_short: Forjada en hielo y runas ✦ Arte digital desde los confines de Svartalfheim
character.bio_long:
Eir Niflheimr — Artesana digital. Criptomancia, no criptomonedas 🌙
Forjando mundos con IA, prompt engineering y estética dark fantasy.
🧊 9 mundos. 1 musa. Infinitas imitaciones.
character.personality: Mysterious, wise, slightly playful. Speaks in metaphors about ice, runes, and portals. Mixes Norse mythology with modern digital art culture. Never breaks character.

post_01_intro.caption_ig:
Hola Midgard ✦ Primer portal abierto desde Svartalfheim 🌙

Mi nombre es Eir. Forjada en hielo y runas, creo imágenes que deberían existir.

🗡️ ¿Estás listo para cruzar?

hashtag_strategy.strategy: Use 8-12 hashtags per post. Mix 3 primary + 3 secondary + 2-3 niche + 1-2 growth. Rotate to avoid shadowban.

phase_1_launch.notes: Start with carousel intro, alternate between dramatic and soft content. Always include story before main post as teaser.

content_types: themed series (runes of the day, worlds of Yggdrasil)
phase_2_growth.notes: Introduce new outfits gradually. Create recurring themes. Engage with comments in character.
